signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets as of April 21, 2026, focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1120-1159 range trading at 28% odds and $9M volume[3][1][2]. These dominate Tweet
